rent.note: furnished 1BR; centre ~$234; lakeside from €300; summer prices spike significantly

groceries.note: home cooking; local market produce cheap

diningOut.note: local tavernas cheap; tourist premium near lake in summer

transit.note: limited local buses; walking or scooter more practical

coworking.note: virtually no dedicated coworking; cafés with WiFi main option

simData.note: Macedonian SIM; T-Mobile MK; reasonable coverage

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Lakeside tourist town; extreme summer peak.

evidence.quote: In Ohrid's center, a one-bedroom apartment runs about $234 per month, with prices dropping to around $168 further out. Ohrid offers lakeside living from €300 per month

evidence.claim: total monthly costs with rent ~$932 for digital nomads; under €1,000/mo easy if cooking
evidence.quote: Total monthly costs with rent usually land around $932 for digital nomads. It would be very easy to live for under €1000 per month if cooking for yourself most nights

evidence.claim: North Macedonia single-person budget €600–800/mo; Ohrid popular summer destination
evidence.quote: a comfortable single-person budget starts at just €600–800 per month across North Macedonia

evidence.claim: Ohrid digital nomad guide noting sparse WiFi and limited infrastructure vs. Skopje
